content: اِلتَمرين بِتاَع اِلكورَة اِلساَعَة عَشَرَة باِلليل
translations: eng:football practice is at ten in the evening

transcriptions.arabizi: iltamreen bitaeA ilkoora ilsaeAa Aashara billeel
